title: notanthera verticillatus
intro: Notanthera verticillatus, also known as the yellow broom or yellow brush, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Notanthera verticillatus include its ability to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. Notanthera verticillatus can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its herbal remedies, making it a versatile plant with potential therapeutic uses.
